title: centella difformis
intro: Centella difformis, also known as gotu kola, is a perennial plant native to Asia and Australia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and distinctive leaf shape. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of centella difformis include improved cognitive function, enhanced wound healing, and reduced stress levels, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin and brain health. Centella difformis is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is also used in traditional Indian Ayurvedic and Chinese medicine.
